title: MrFeg's Lightning Items
description: The Lightning Items Mod is a combat and exploration-focused mod that brings the power of thunderstorms into Minecraft. It adds new lightning-themed tools, weapons, mobs, blocks, biomes, dimensions, and a mysterious ARG storyline hidden beneath..Find Out...
body:
THIS MOD HAS LIGHTNING / THUNDER ITEMS 



  ⚡ Lightning Items Mod

Forge & Neoforge | Created by Mr FEG

Bring the fury of the storm into Minecraft with the Lightning Items Mod!, a combat and exploration enhancement mod that introduces a powerful set of lightning-themed tools, weapons, blocks, and mechanics.


****🧩 Features:****

****Lightning Items:****

->Lightning Staff , Bow And Arrow , Lightning Shards , Throwables , etc... And Much More Added To This Game!

****New Ores & Blocks:****

->Discover Lightning Ore and Lightning Crystal Ore underground. Smelt them to craft powerful gear or use decorative blocks like the Lightning Block or Cursed Block for spooky vibes.

****Dimensional Mechanics:****

->Use special blocks like the Entity World Portal to access mysterious dimensions or trigger unique effects.

****New Structures & Entities:****

->Encounter new terrain features and mob that tie into the lightning theme This Focuses More On Lore Mechanics In This Game.

->The Entity Is In Your Game That You Can Summon And Fight With It.

****->This mod Adds New Dimension And An Overworld Biome So Play This Mod in New World Rather Than Your Personal World For Better Survival Gameplay****. 

****Custom Sounds and Models:(Ongoing)****

->Fully immersive with custom textures, 3D models, and sounds for more Horror like gameplay.


****CRAFTING & MECHANICS:****

-> To See These Item Recipes You Can Check Out ****Not Enough Items Mod****.To See And Craft

->The Mechanics Of How To Find The Entity , These Items And Blocks And Also Travel Biomes And Dimensions Is Upto You, Figure Out And Explore The World..... And Find Out For Yourself For Better Experience!

****🧩 Uncover the truth 8962 behind the storm.(STILL IS IN PROGRESS)****

->What began as a lightning-themed progression mod hides something much darker...
This is not just a mod That Adds Only Lightning Based Items — it’s a piece of a larger ARG (Alternate Reality Game) experience. Strange artifacts. Broken logic. Creeping dread. And something is watching.For Now Some Of Them Are Not Yet Implemented...

****🧩 ARG Elements & Hidden Lore(Still In Progress)****

--> Mysterious Audio And Books Are In That Particular Biome in The Overworld Rather Than Anywhere.

-->More Interesting Items Are Added That Drags Deeply Into A NEW DIMENSION! 

If You Have Any Suggestions To Help My Mod Lore Going On Please Do Comment. 



****THIS MOD IS NOT FINISHED YET ESPECIALLY MY ONGOING LORE SO STAY TUNED FOR FUTURE UPDATES!****

                                                           THANKYOU!!!



****CHECK OUT MOD TRAILERS On My YOUTUBE Channel!****
